text: hamasa asher chaza chavaquq hanavi
'ad-ana yehva shiva'eti velo tishema' eze'aq eleykha chamas velo tovshi'a
lama tareeni aven ve'amal tabit veshod vechamas lenegedi vayehi riv umadovn yisa
'al-ken tafug tovra velo-yetse lanetsach mishepat ki rasha' makhetir et-hatsadiq 'al-ken yetse mishepat me'uqal
reu vagovyim vehabitu vehitamehu temahu ki-fo'al po'el bimeykhem lo taaminu ki yesupar
ki-hineni meqim et-hakasedim hagovy hamar vehanimehar hahovlekh lemerechavey-erets lareshet mishekanovt lo-lov
ayom venovra hu mimenu mishepatov useetov yetse
veqalu minemerim susayv vechadu mizeevey 'erev ufashu parashayv ufarashayv merachovq yavou ya'ufu kenesher chash leekhovl
kulo lechamas yavov megamat peneyhem qadima vayeesof kachovl shevi
vehu bamelakhim yiteqalas verozenim misechaq lov hu lekhal-mivetsar yisechaq vayitsebor 'afar vayilekedah
az chalaf rucha vaya'avor veashem zu khochov lelohov
halov ata miqedem yehva elohay qedoshi lo namut yehva lemishepat sametov vetsur lehovkhicha yesadetov
tehovr 'eynayim mereovt ra' vehabit el-'amal lo tukhal lama tabit bovgedim tacharish bevala' rasha' tsadiq mimenu
vata'ase adam kidegey hayam keremes lo-moshel bov
kulo bechaka he'ala yegorehu vecheremov veyaasefehu bemikhemaretov 'al-ken yisemach veyagil
'al-ken yezabecha lecheremov viqater lemikhemaretov ki vahema shamen cheleqov umaakhalov beria
ha'al ken yariq cheremov vetamid laharog govyim lo yachemovl s
'al-mishemareti e'emoda veeteyatseva 'al-matsovr vaatsape lireovt mah-yedaber-bi uma ashiv 'al-tovkhacheti
vaya'aneni yehva vayomer ketovv chazovn uvaer 'al-haluchovt lema'an yaruts qovre vov
ki 'ovd chazovn lamov'ed veyafecha laqets velo yekhazev im-yitemahemah chakeh-lov ki-vo yavo lo yeacher
hine 'upela lo-yashera nafeshov bov vetsadiq beemunatov yicheye
veaf ki-hayayin bovged gever yahir velo yineve asher hirechiv kisheovl nafeshov vehu khamavet velo yiseba' vayeesof elayv kal-hagovyim vayiqebots elayv kal-ha'amim
halov-ele khulam 'alayv mashal yisau umelitsa chidovt lov veyomar hovy hamarebe lo-lov 'ad-matay umakhebid 'alayv 'avetit
halov feta' yaqumu noshekheykha veyiqetsu meza'eze'eykha vehayita limeshisovt lamov
ki ata shalovta govyim rabim yeshalukha kal-yeter 'amim midemey adam vachamas-erets qireya vekhal-yoshevey vah f
hovy botse'a betsa' ra' leveytov lasum bamarovm qinov lehinatsel mikaf-ra'
ya'atseta boshet leveytekha qetsovt-'amim rabim vechovte nafeshekha
ki-even miqir tize'aq vekhafis me'ets ya'anena f
hovy bone 'ir bedamim vekhovnen qireya be'avela
halov hine meet yehva tsevaovt veyige'u 'amim bedey-esh uleumim bedey-riq yi'afu
ki timale haarets lada'at et-kevovd yehva kamayim yekhasu 'al-yam s
hovy masheqe re'ehu mesapecha chamatekha veaf shaker lema'an habit 'al-me'ovreyhem
sava'eta qalovn mikavovd shete gam-ata vehe'arel tisovv 'aleykha kovs yemin yehva veqiqalovn 'al-kevovdekha
ki chamas levanovn yekhaseka veshod behemovt yechitan midemey adam vachamas-erets qireya vekhal-yoshevey vah s
mah-hov'il pesel ki fesalov yotserov masekha umovre shaqer ki vatach yotser yitserov 'alayv la'asovt elilim ilemim s
hovy omer la'ets haqitsa 'uri leeven dumam hu yovre hineh-hu tafus zahav vakhesef vekhal-rucha eyn beqirebov
vayhva beheykhal qadeshov has mipanayv kal-haarets f
tefila lachavaquq hanavi 'al shigeyonovt
yehva shama'eti shime'akha yareti yehva pa'alekha beqerev shanim chayeyhu beqerev shanim tovdi'a berogez rachem tizekovr
elovha miteyman yavov veqadovsh mehar-paran sela kisa shamayim hovdov utehilatov malea haarets
venogah kaovr tiheye qarenayim miyadov lov vesham cheveyovn 'uzo ׃
lefanayv yelekh daver veyetse reshef leragelayv
'amad ׀ vayemoded erets raa vayater govyim vayitepotsetsu harerey-'ad shachu give'ovt 'ovlam halikhovt 'ovlam lov ׃
tachat aven raiti aholey khushan yiregezun yeri'ovt erets mideyan s
havineharim chara yehva im baneharim apekha im-bayam 'everatekha ki tirekav 'al-suseykha marekevoteykha yeshu'a
'ereya te'ovr qashetekha shevu'ovt matovt omer sela neharovt tevaqa'-arets
raukha yachilu harim zerem mayim 'avar natan tehovm qovlov rovm yadeyhu nasa
shemesh yarecha 'amad zevula leovr chitseykha yehalekhu lenogah beraq chanitekha
beza'am titse'ad-arets beaf tadush govyim
yatsata leyesha' 'amekha leyesha' et-meshichekha machatseta rosh mibeyt rasha' 'arovt yesovd 'ad-tsavar sela f
naqaveta vematayv rosh perazov kh perazayv q yise'aru lahafitseni 'alitsutam kemov-leekhol 'ani bamisetar
darakheta vayam suseykha chomer mayim rabim
shama'eti ׀ vatiregaz biteni leqovl tsalalu sefatay yavov raqav ba'atsamay vetachetay eregaz asher anucha leyovm tsara la'alovt le'am yegudenu
ki-teena lo-tiferach veeyn yevul bagefanim kichesh ma'aseh-zayit ushedemovt lo-'asa okhel gazar mimikhela tson veeyn baqar barefatim
vaani bayhva e'elovza agila belohey yishe'i
yehvi adonay cheyli vayasem ragelay kaayalovt ve'al bamovtay yaderikheni lamenatsecha bineginovtay
